title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Lodha Group Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Lodha Group Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Lodha Group Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lodha Group Digital Technologies:
Lodha Group Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha Group Digital Technologies!
